meaning: Council 惠特利协议会(即英国联合工业协议会)
examples: The crop is the hottest thing in hair right now as Rosie Huntington-Whitley, Lily Collins and Scarlett Johansson all go for the chop.
Saresa Whitley is serving five years for assault at the Coffee Creek Correctional Facility, a women's prison in Oregon.
Dr Banks Whitley said the blood condition may have been inherited by Elizabeth and Mary and could explain why both died childless.
Whitley is a leading expert on herpes but was not involved in the current study.
Gaydon, Whitley and Castle Bromwich are all good places to be at the moment.
